text: The dim light washes the sterile hallway with a sense of abandonment; I feel like an outsider peering into a world left behind. The silence around me sharpens my thoughts, raises questions of purpose and belonging. In the second image, the faint outlines and words evoke curiosity, but their meaning is obscured by darkness. I feel the uneasy allure of spaces meant for discovery now shrouded in uncertainty. It is both isolating and intriguing to stand here, suspended between inquiry and the unknown.
